title: Bombay Hospital South Asia Partners is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Bombay Hospital South Asia Partners is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Bombay Hospital South Asia Partners in Ranchi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Bombay Hospital South Asia Partners:
Bombay Hospital South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Hospital South Asia Partners!
